fields.description: Implement 300-line and 600-line diff size thresholds in review-complexity-classifier.sh. 300+ lines of non-test, non-generated code triggers a SIZE_ACTION=upgrade (opus model override at current tier scope). 600+ lines triggers SIZE_ACTION=reject with a structured message referencing the large-diff-splitting-guide.md. Merge commits bypass size limits. Re-review passes (REVIEW_PASS_NUM >= 2) also bypass limits.
